_comment: Edit the tiers below to update the sliding pay scale. 'upTo' is the top mileage for that tier; the LAST tier must use null to mean 'and up'. 'cpm' is the pay per mile. After editing, save this file and re-upload it to GitHub. No need to touch index.html.
footnote: Pay shown is line-haul pay per load based on its individual length of haul. Stop pay, fuel, bonuses, and other charges are not included. Cost Center 106 and 150.
